applicationServices.description: Submit optimization jobs; stream status/results.

applicationServices.name: Shop-floor Capture API
applicationServices.description: Ingest actuals, downtime codes, deviations from mobile or terminals.

applicationServices.name: COA API

applicationComponents.name: Delivery Console (Team Builds-as-a-Service)

applicationServices.name: web
applicationServices.description: web interface for Delivery Console (Team Builds-as-a-Service).

applicationServices.name: Blueprint API
applicationServices.description: Define reusable solution blueprints (selected bricks, configs, roles, connectors).

applicationServices.name: Tenant Provisioning API
applicationServices.description: Provision environments, apply RBAC templates, enable connectors.

applicationInteractions.description: Formulation Workbench exchanges domain information with Production Execution Cockpit as part of the end-to-end operating model.
Production Execution Cockpit exchanges domain information with Quality & Lab Portal as part of the end-to-end operating model.
Quality & Lab Portal exchanges domain information with Supplier Qualification & Spec Exchange as part of the end-to-end operating model.
Supplier Qualification & Spec Exchange exchanges domain information with Customer Order & Document Hub as part of the end-to-end operating model.
Customer Order & Document Hub exchanges domain information with Executive Command Center as part of the end-to-end operating model.
Executive Command Center exchanges domain information with Integration & API Fabric as part of the end-to-end operating model.
Integration & API Fabric exchanges domain information with Sustainability & Ingredient Impact Scorecards as part of the end-to-end operating model.
Sustainability & Ingredient Impact Scorecards exchanges domain information with Training & Research Sandbox as part of the end-to-end operating model.
Training & Research Sandbox exchanges domain information with Delivery Console (Team Builds-as-a-Service) as part of the end-to-end operating model.
